subject: science
title: Grade 1 Science
description: Explore the five senses, living and non-living things, and the seasons.

lessons.title: The Five Senses
lessons.objective: Identify and describe the five senses and the body parts used for each.
lessons.content:
We use our FIVE SENSES to explore the world around us!

👁️ SIGHT — We use our eyes to see colours, shapes, and movement.
👂 HEARING — We use our ears to hear sounds like music, rain, and talking.
👃 SMELL — We use our nose to smell flowers, food, and the fresh air.
👅 TASTE — We use our tongue to taste sweet, sour, salty, and bitter.
✋ TOUCH — We use our skin to feel things that are soft, hard, hot, or cold.

Each sense sends messages to our BRAIN, which helps us understand the world!

exercises.question: Which body part do we use to hear sounds?
exercises.hint: Think about what body part helps you listen to music.
exercises.explanation: We use our ears to hear sounds! Our ears pick up sound waves and send messages to our brain.

exercises.question: Which sense do we use when we feel if something is hot or cold?
exercises.hint: We use our skin and hands for this sense.
exercises.explanation: We use our sense of touch! Our skin can feel temperature, textures, and pressure.

lessons.title: Living and Non-Living Things
lessons.objective: Tell the difference between living and non-living things.
lessons.content:
Everything around us is either LIVING or NON-LIVING.

🌱 LIVING things:
  • Breathe (need air)
  • Eat (need food and water)
  • Grow (get bigger over time)
  • Move (can move by themselves)
  • Reproduce (can make new living things)

Examples: dogs, cats, trees, flowers, fish, YOU!

🪨 NON-LIVING things:
  • Don't breathe, eat, or grow
  • Don't move on their own
  • Don't reproduce

Examples: rocks, water, toys, shoes, books

exercises.question: Which of these is a living thing?
exercises.hint: Which one grows and needs water?
exercises.explanation: A sunflower is living! It grows, needs water and sunlight, and can make seeds.

exercises.question: What do ALL living things need?
exercises.hint: Think about what every animal and plant needs to survive.
exercises.explanation: All living things need food and water to stay alive and grow!
